dialogue.speaker: Alice
dialogue.text: Hello Bob! Thanks for coming in today. We've just made a huge breakthrough.

dialogue.speaker: Bob
dialogue.text: That's incredible, Alice! Can you tell me more about what you've discovered?

dialogue.speaker: Alice
dialogue.text: Of course! We've developed an AI system that can generate realistic videos from text descriptions.

dialogue.speaker: Bob
dialogue.text: Wow, that sounds revolutionary. How does the lip synchronisation work?

dialogue.speaker: Alice
dialogue.text: Great question! We analyse the audio waveform and map the energy to mouth openings in real time.

dialogue.speaker: Bob
dialogue.text: And the character visuals — are those generated by Ollama as well?

dialogue.speaker: Alice
dialogue.text: Yes! Ollama's language model describes each character's appearance, and our renderer brings them to life.

dialogue.speaker: Bob
dialogue.text: This is truly impressive work, Alice. When will the public be able to use it?

dialogue.speaker: Alice
dialogue.text: We're planning to release it very soon. Stay tuned — the future of storytelling is here!
